overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character exploring an overgrown stone plantation house and ruins at night. The character walks along an exterior path before entering a vine-covered garden and navigating through ivy-draped interior archways illuminated by warm lamplight.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path alongside stone plantation house

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path beside a large stone building with illuminated arched windows

entered.detail: large two-story stone building with multiple arched openings and warm interior lighting
unpaved dirt trail running alongside the building
low stone wall bordering the path with vegetation growing on top
tall palm tree silhouetted against the night sky
wooden barrel sitting beside the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path beside a large stone plantation house at night. The building features arched windows glowing with warm light, and the path is bordered by a low stone wall and scattered vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown garden entrance with vine-covered archway

events.description: turns off the main path into an overgrown garden area with a large vine-covered archway

agents.ego_description: walking through a garden archway covered in dense vines and foliage toward the main building

entered.detail: stone archway completely covered in dense green vines and foliage
lush tropical plants and bushes surrounding the path
open courtyard area visible through the archway with stone paving

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a garden area and approaches a large vine-covered stone archway. The plantation house is now visible in the background through the dense foliage, and the ground transitions from dirt to grass as the character moves toward the interior courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior ruins with ivy-covered walls and multiple stone archways

events.description: enters the interior courtyard with dense ivy covering the stone walls and arches

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow passages between ivy-covered stone walls and arches in the ruins

entered.detail: stone wall completely covered in dense green ivy and climbing plants
series of connected stone archways forming corridors through the ruins
cobblestone floor with patches of grass growing between stones
lit stone lantern providing warm illumination

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the ruins, walking through a series of narrow stone archways. The walls are completely covered in dense ivy, and the space is illuminated by warm lamplight. The ground is paved with old cobblestones, creating an enclosed, atmospheric corridor through the overgrown structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open nighttime path beside a stone plantation house into the claustrophobic, ivy-draped ruins of its interior. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path bordered by a low stone wall, passing arched windows that glow with warm light. As the character turns away from the main building, the terrain shifts from dirt to grass while the camera approaches a large, vine-covered stone archway. The scene then moves deeper into the ruins, transitioning from the open garden into a series of narrow, enclosed corridors. Finally, the environment becomes a dense tunnel of ivy-covered stone walls and cobblestone flooring, all illuminated by the soft, atmospheric glow of lamplight.
